meanings.definition: wet feed (especially for pigs) consisting of mostly kitchen waste mixed with water or skimmed or sour milk
cheap clothing (as formerly issued to sailors in Britain)
wet feed (especially for pigs) consisting of mostly kitchen waste mixed with water or skimmed or sour milk
deep soft mud in water or slush
(usually plural) waste water from a kitchen or bathroom or chamber pot that has to be emptied by hand
examples: she carried out the sink slops

meanings.definition: (usually plural) weak or watery unappetizing food or drink
examples: he lived on the thin slops that food kitchens provided

meanings.definition: writing or music that is excessively sweet and sentimental
cause or allow (a liquid substance) to run or flow from a container

examples: We had to splosh across the wet meadow
slop the food onto the plate
